data.title: RED: add test_dependency_check_section_present structural test and .test-index marker
data.description:
## Story
4c55-0c7a

## testing_mode
RED

## What
Add structural test `test_dependency_check_section_present` to `tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh` and RED marker to `.test-index`.

Test greps SKILL.md for dep-check structural signals: /bin/bash.*--version, coreutils or gdate, brew install, optional dep with timeout pattern. Per behavioral testing standard Rule 5 — structural boundary only, no content assertions.

## Files to Modify
- tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh — add test_dependency_check_section_present() + call before print_summary
- .test-index — add: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh [test_dependency_check_section_present]

## Acceptance Criteria
- test_dependency_check_section_present exists in test file
- Test greps for dep-check keywords in SKILL.md
- .test-index RED marker added
- Test FAILS RED before Task 4cc2 (dep-check section not yet in SKILL.md)
